_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Steward the cyberspace operator work role.
reference_document_element_description: Manage the enterprise data stewardship network, including steward onboarding, role clarity, tools access, and regular steward community engagement.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.460), DG-S-006 (DG, cosine: 0.426).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.539). Shared vocabulary: [role, steward]. DCWF-only terms [cyberspace, operator, work] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, clarity, community, data, engagement, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.852 (P=0.862, R=0.842). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Steward the cyberspace operator work role." and "Manage the enterprise data stewardship network, including steward onboarding, ro" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.484 < STS 0.539 (gap -0.055). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [cyberspace, operator, work] and [access, clarity, community] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [role, steward]. DCWF-only: [cyberspace, operator, work]. WIDAI-only: [access, clarity, community, data, engagement, enterprise].
